data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of auto-deletion after 24 hours.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that the temporary booking link auto-deletes 24 hours after the scheduled meeting. However, the evidence provided does not confirm this functionality; it only describes the generation and usage of the link without any explicit mention of its expiration. Therefore, the requirement cannot be conclusively validated based on the current evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the temporary booking link expires automatically after the meeting.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
